economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 8x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
falsifiers: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Predictable cash-flow security). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ACMR, including wet clean equipment owner cash, backlog option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37 (ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

component_groups.label: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.economic_claim: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.adjustments: Margin and working-capital stress in cycle reserve.

component_groups.label: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.economic_claim: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.adjustments: Low case zero; base does not assume full backlog NPV.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Deferred revenue $252M at 12/31/2025; base assumes partial conversion over three years without heroics.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Backlog ships as advanced packaging tools install; [Assumption] 3-year base.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Low/high stress cash and debt bands.

component_groups.label: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve for OCF trough and geo concentration.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Margin and working-capital stress in cycle reserve.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

limitations: Contract backfill scaffold; not a committee-approved valuation.
Backlog milestone band remains widest judgment range pending segment disclosure.
